subject: request for new ctpy name - sierra pacific holding co.

emails.subject: Re: Request for New CTPY Name - Sierra Pacific Holding Co.
emails.subject_base: Request for New CTPY Name - Sierra Pacific Holding Co.
emails.body: Yes, the correct name does include "Inc." at the end. And yes, Steve Hall said the master agreement works for this trade. He and Bob Ellery at Sierra talked over the agreement and decided to use the name that Sierra Pacific Holding Co. is doing business under. I've changed the deal (573679) in EnPower. Please let me know if you turn up any more questions. Thanks, Kate Melissa Ann Murphy 04/12/2001 06:52 AM

emails.subject: Re: Request for New CTPY Name - Sierra Pacific Holding Co.
emails.subject_base: Request for New CTPY Name - Sierra Pacific Holding Co.
emails.body: Hello, Sierra Pacific Industries, Inc. is a choice in Enpower. Is this the correct name with the "Inc." on it? I am assuming that Steve Hall said it is OK to use the master agreement for this trade. Thanks, Melissa Kate Symes 04/11/2001 07:38 PM
